_comment: Icarus Live Map — Linux server configuration. Restart server.py after editing.

live._comment_live: How to read the currently running prospect's GD.json for live player positions.
live._comment_host: Fastest option: mount the Docker volume and set the path here. Example: /mnt/icarus/Saved/PlayerData/DedicatedServer/Prospects/GD.json
live._comment_docker: Used only when host_save_path is empty. The server runs 'docker exec <container> cat <path>' every poll_interval_players seconds.

_comment_sg: Directory containing GD.json files for POI display (caves, deposits, geysers). Each file appears as a selectable savegame in the browser UI. You can name them anything (e.g. Olympus.json, Styx.json, Prospect1.json).
_comment_poll: How often (seconds) to re-read the live save for player positions.
_comment_scan: How often (seconds) to rescan savegames_dir for new or changed files.
